name: Baked Potato Soup II
recipeIngredient: 1 cup grated cheese (Cheddar, Edam, and/or Colby)
salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake potatoes ahead of time and refrigerate.
2. In a 3-quart or medium soup pot, brown bacon until crisp. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. Pour off all fat except 1 tablespoon and add butter. Add onions and sauté 5 minutes over medium heat until soft, but not brown.
4. Stir in flour; stir and cook for 1 minute.
5. Add broth, bring to a boil and cook for 2 minutes.
6. Peel and dice potatoes. Add diced potatoes, half-and-half, and sautéed bacon. Simmer for 10-15 minutes.
7. Add cheese and green onions. Stir until cheese is melted.
